Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cheska]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Cheska is the author of the burned message.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Cheska provided a recommendation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Cheska sent a message.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Cheska wears a gold-trimmed blue suit and a wide hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Cheska is at the head of the table.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Cheska provided a solution for approaching the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Cheska is a captain who uses a captain's horn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Cheska was organizing a search.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Cheska is a character who snorts at the mention of Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Cheska is a person who predicted Calder would get involved.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Cheska is not capable of defending herself from a Consultant Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Cheska was leaning over Calder when he woke up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Cheska is the Head of the Navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Cheska is exhausted and staggering next to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Cheska provided Calder with estimates regarding Captain Tommison and The Reliable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Cheska provided information regarding the mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Cheska is waiting on the docks with a team of Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Cheska is a Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Cheska puts her people first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Cheska is present in the room with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Cheska is someone who has room on The Eternal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Cheska owns the ship The Eternal.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
